root_causes.cause: R2 Serial0/1/0 is configured shutdown (administratively down), so the interface is down on R2.
evidence: R2 running-config: interfaces -> Serial -> name: "0/1/0" contains "shutdown": [ null ]
R2 running-config: interfaces -> Serial -> name: "0/1/0" ip address primary: "10.0.0.2" (shows interface exists but is shut)

root_causes.type: Remote-side admin down causing local lower-layer-down
root_causes.cause: R1 Serial0/1/0 is administratively up (no shutdown) but shows operational 'lower-layer-down' because the far end (R2) is administratively down, preventing link/up of the physical/line protocol.
evidence: R1 running-config: interfaces -> Serial -> name: "0/1/0" has IP address primary "10.0.0.1" and no "shutdown" stanza (interface is admin up)
Topology/run-config evidence: R1 Serial0/1/0 10.0.0.1/30 <-> R2 Serial0/1/0 10.0.0.2/30 (interfaces expected to be a point-to-point link)
Alert description: R1 oper -> lower-layer-down, admin up; R2 oper -> down, admin -> down (matches configurations above)

data.intent_description: R2 Serial0/1/0 is administratively down causing R1 Serial0/1/0 to report lower-layer-down; goal is to restore the point-to-point link so both interfaces are administratively and operationally up.

plan.problem: R2 Serial0/1/0 is administratively shutdown, preventing link with R1 and causing R1 oper state lower-layer-down.
plan.fix_summary: Bring R2 Serial0/1/0 administratively up (remove shutdown) so the serial link with R1 can achieve up/up.

messages.content:
What was observed
- R1 Serial0/1/0 (10.0.0.1/30) was administratively up but operationally "lower-layer-down".
- R2 Serial0/1/0 (10.0.0.2/30) was administratively down.

Diagnosis (main cause)
- R2 Serial0/1/0 was administratively shutdown, preventing the serial link from coming up.

Changes made
- Executed "no shutdown" on R2 Serial0/1/0 to bring the interface administratively up.

Verification
- Passed. R2 Serial0/1/0 is now admin up / oper up (verified by get_interface_status: admin_state="up", oper_state="up", last_change=2026-05-26T09:25:45Z).
- The point-to-point link is restored; no remaining issues detected.
